phrases.intent_en: Ask where the ferry tickets are sold
phrases.text_local: Scusi, onde vende os bilhetes do ferry?
phrases.pronunciation: skoo-ZEE, OHNG-dih VAYNG-dih OOSH bee-LYEH-tihsh DOO FEH-ree?
phrases.cultural_note: The ferry to Ilha de Tavira departs from the Gilão River promenade near the Roman Bridge.

likely_response.translation_en: At the kiosk near the bridge.

responses.english: At the kiosk near the bridge.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a plataforma de observação das ruínas romanas?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH pluh-tuh-FAW-ruh-muh DIH awb-sih-ruh-vuh-SOWN DUHSH ROOEE-nuhsh roo-MAHN-nuhsh?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a plataforma de observação das ruínas romanas.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH pluh-tuh-FAW-ruh-muh DIH awb-sih-ruh-vuh-SOWN DUHSH ROOEE-nuhsh roo-MAHN-nuhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Roman ruins viewing platform.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Roman ruins viewing platform.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH pluh-tuh-FAW-ruh-muh DIH awb-sih-ruh-vuh-SOWN DUHSH ROOEE-nuhsh roo-MAHN-nuhsh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a plataforma de observação das ruínas romanas.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the historic center entrance is
phrases.text_local: Por qual via se acede ao centro histórico?
phrases.pronunciation: POOR KWAHL VEEUH SIH uh-SEH-dih OW SAYNGT-roo eesh-TAW-ree-koo?
phrases.cultural_note: Pedestrian priority is strictly enforced on this historic crossing.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, aceda pela Rua da Ponte.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, uh-SEH-duh PEH-luh ROOUH DUH POHNG-tih.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, access via Rua da Ponte.

responses.english: Good morning, access via Rua da Ponte.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, uh-SEH-duh PEH-luh ROOUH DUH POHNG-tih.
responses.local: Bom dia, aceda pela Rua da Ponte.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the river tour kiosk is
phrases.text_local: Onde está o ponto de partida dos passeios de barco?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AW POHNG-too DIH puh-ruh-TEE-duh DOOSH puh-SAYOOSH DIH BAH-ruh-koo?
phrases.cultural_note: Boat tours along the Gilão River offer scenic views of the seven-arch bridge.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, o quiosque fica na marginal.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, AW KEEOHSH-kih FEE-kuh NUH muh-ruh-zhee-NAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, the kiosk is on the waterfront.

responses.english: Good morning, the kiosk is on the waterfront.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, AW KEEOHSH-kih FEE-kuh NUH muh-ruh-zhee-NAHL.
responses.local: Bom dia, o quiosque fica na marginal.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the historic center entrance is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a entrada do centro histórico?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH ayngt-RAH-duh DOO SAYNGT-roo eesh-TAW-ree-koo?
phrases.cultural_note: Rua da Ponte is the main access from the bridge into Tavira's historic center.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, na Rua da Ponte.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH ROOUH DUH POHNG-tih.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, on Rua da Ponte.

responses.english: Good morning, on Rua da Ponte.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH ROOUH DUH POHNG-tih.
responses.local: Bom dia, na Rua da Ponte.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the ferry ticket booth is
phrases.text_local: Onde é a bilheteira do ferry?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih EH AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh DOO FEH-ree?
phrases.cultural_note: Ferries to Ilha de Tavira depart from the riverbank near the bridge.

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao segurança municipal no cais do rio Gilão.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW seh-goo-RAHNNG-suh moo-nee-see-PAHL NOO KEYESH DOO REEOO zhee-LOWN.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the municipal guard at the Gilão River pier.

responses.english: Ask the municipal guard at the Gilão River pier.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW seh-goo-RAHNNG-suh moo-nee-see-PAHL NOO KEYESH DOO REEOO zhee-LOWN.
responses.local: Pergunte ao segurança municipal no cais do rio Gilão.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso estacionar perto da Ponte Romana de Tavira?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo shtuh-seeoo-NAHR PEHR-too DUH POHNG-tih roo-MAHN-nuh DIH tuh-VEE-ruh?
phrases.cultural_note: Street parking operates on a metered system during daylight hours.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a zona de estacionamento pago.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH ZOH-nuh DIH shtuh-seeoo-nuh-MAYNG-too PAH-goo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the paid parking zone.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the paid parking zone.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH ZOH-nuh DIH shtuh-seeoo-nuh-MAYNG-too PAH-goo.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a zona de estacionamento pago.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the viewing platform is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a plataforma de observação das ruínas romanas?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH pluh-tuh-FAW-ruh-muh DIH awb-sih-ruh-vuh-SOWN DUHSH ROOEE-nuhsh roo-MAHN-nuhsh?
phrases.cultural_note: The eastern bank hosts a dedicated platform to view ancient Roman bridge foundations.

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao guarda municipal (GNR) ou ao guia do barco turístico do rio.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW GWAH-ruh-duh moo-nee-see-PAHL zhehehn-EHRR OHW OW GEEUH DOO BAH-ruh-koo too-REESH-tee-koo DOO REEOO.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the municipal guard (GNR) or the river tour boat guide.

responses.english: Ask the municipal guard (GNR) or the river tour boat guide.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW GWAH-ruh-duh moo-nee-see-PAHL zhehehn-EHRR OHW OW GEEUH DOO BAH-ruh-koo too-REESH-tee-koo DOO REEOO.
responses.local: Pergunte ao guarda municipal (GNR) ou ao guia do barco turístico do rio.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the river tour kiosk is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o quiosque de passeios no rio Gilão?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW KEEOHSH-kih DIH puh-SAYOOSH NOO REEOO zhee-LOWN?
phrases.cultural_note: The kiosk is known locally as a starting point for boat tours along the Gilão River.

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao guia do barco turístico ou ao segurança municipal (GNR) na zona da ponte.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW GEEUH DOO BAH-ruh-koo too-REESH-tee-koo OHW OW seh-goo-RAHNNG-suh moo-nee-see-PAHL zhehehn-EHRR NUH ZOH-nuh DUH POHNG-tih.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the river tour boat guide or the municipal guard (GNR) near the bridge area.

responses.english: Ask the river tour boat guide or the municipal guard (GNR) near the bridge area.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW GEEUH DOO BAH-ruh-koo too-REESH-tee-koo OHW OW seh-goo-RAHNNG-suh moo-nee-see-PAHL zhehehn-EHRR NUH ZOH-nuh DUH POHNG-tih.
responses.local: Pergunte ao guia do barco turístico ou ao segurança municipal (GNR) na zona da ponte.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the historic center entrance is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a entrada principal do centro histórico?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH ayngt-RAH-duh preen-see-PAHL DOO SAYNGT-roo eesh-TAW-ree-koo?
phrases.cultural_note: The bridge serves as the primary pedestrian gateway to Tavira's old town.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, entre pela Rua da Ponte.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, AYNGT-rih PEH-luh ROOUH DUH POHNG-tih.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, enter via Rua da Ponte.

responses.english: Good morning, enter via Rua da Ponte.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, AYNGT-rih PEH-luh ROOUH DUH POHNG-tih.
responses.local: Bom dia, entre pela Rua da Ponte.

phrases.cultural_note: Street parking with meters is common in Tavira; look for designated spots near the bridge.

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao atendente de estacionamento Zona Azul.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW uh-tayng-DAYNG-tih DIH shtuh-seeoo-nuh-MAYNG-too ZOH-nuh uh-ZOOW.

responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW uh-tayng-DAYNG-tih DIH shtuh-seeoo-nuh-MAYNG-too ZOH-nuh uh-ZOOW.
responses.local: Pergunte ao atendente de estacionamento Zona Azul.
